posts.raw_content:
"this shouldn't be a partisan issue - republicans democrats and independents - should all want fair and secure elections..." 


...if we come together to address the election integrity issues and inherent vulnerabilities, if a majority of american people were again confident that the government represented the will of the voters, it would go a long way to diffuse an unfortunate simmering partisan conflict; a conflict that is a consequence of when the people of all political persuasions do not feel heard... tonight I regret to inform the american people that their voices have in fact not been heard. their voices were subverted by a vulnerable voting system exploited by foreign adversaries...
